creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jake from comment #5)
A major problem here is that the FreeBSD pkg system actually do not allow downloading additional files during the pkgbuild or more specifically there is no network access after the fetch stage in the pkg build. So I cannot build the entire pkg when yarn and npm are in the game. There are hacks around which I will need to see but that is going to take time.

I will look into options of adding some manual notes in the time being.
